CP_010_PRAISE_2.Text: You seem to be in good shape!

CP_010_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: Going in for an awakened move!

CP_010_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: Going in for an awakened move!

CP_010_LEVELREPORT_HIGH.Text: I might go for a big move.

CP_010_PROVOCATION_1.Text: Don't blame me if you get hurt.

CP_010_RESPECT_2.Text: I'm not gonna let you beat me.

CP_010_UNIQUE_2.Text: This kind of death is just wrong!

CP_010_UNIQUE_5.Text: That'll work, you've got a deal!

CP_010_UNIQUE_6.Text: What were you trying to do here anyway?

CP_010_UNIQUE_10.Text: What do we do? What do we do? It's a major problem!

CP_020_GREETING_2.Text: Don't forget your place, foolish puppet.

CP_020_PRAISE_2.Text: Your moves aren't bad at all.

CP_020_PINCH.Text: You're a pain in the ass.

CP_020_FIGHTCLOSEBY.Text: We're going for the kill. Follow me.

CP_020_FIGHTCLOSEBY_OUT.Text: We're going for the kill. Follow me.

CP_020_FIGHTAWAY.Text: How infuriating. Get out of my sight.

CP_020_FIGHTAWAY_OUT.Text: How infuriating. Get out of my sight.

CP_020_LETSWORKTOGETHER.Text: Follow my lead, or I'll kill you.

CP_020_LETSWORKTOGETHER_OUT.Text: Follow my lead, or I'll kill you.

CP_020_PROVOCATION_1.Text: That's the way. Just try a little harder.

CP_020_UNIQUE_1.Text: I'll show you exactly what real Jujutsu is.

CP_020_UNIQUE_2.Text: There's no reason to be scared.

CP_020_UNIQUE_3.Text: How pitiful. You couldn't be any more pathetic.

CP_020_UNIQUE_4.Text: Don't poke around inside me without my permission.

CP_020_UNIQUE_6.Text: So, this is when you start burning through your life.

CP_020_UNIQUE_7.Text: Whether you live or die doesn't matter to me.

CP_020_UNIQUE_8.Text: Kind of a waste of your talents.

CP_020_READY.Text: Any time is fine by me.

CP_020_ENDSWITH.Text: The next one's the last one!

CP_020_LETSATTACK.Text: I can finish this right now!

CP_020_FIGHTCAREFULLY.Text: This is going to be fun.

CP_030_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK.Text: It's time for our combo attack!

CP_030_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK_OUT.Text: It's time for our combo attack!

CP_030_PROVOCATION_1.Text: You don't scare me at all.

CP_030_PROVOCATION_2.Text: I'll make short work of you.

CP_030_UNIQUE_1.Text: I'm not a hero. I'm a Jujutsu Sorcerer.

CP_030_UNIQUE_2.Text: It's not about whether I can do it. I have to do it.

CP_030_UNIQUE_3.Text: You're acting so proud, but I've been holding back...

CP_030_UNIQUE_4.Text: The only thing granted equally to all is an unfair reality.

CP_030_UNIQUE_5.Text: You're not even trying. This is too easy.

CP_030_UNIQUE_8.Text: I don't really have a type.

CP_030_UNIQUE_9.Text: I'm irritated all of a sudden.

CP_030_UNIQUE_10.Text: Sort of smells like the sun.

CP_030_UNIQUE_11.Text: This is personal. Please do something.

CP_040_GREETING_2.Text: What say we kick some ass?

CP_040_GRATITUDE_2.Text: I'll make sure you get a medal.

CP_040_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK.Text: Let's give 'em a taste of our combo!

CP_040_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK_OUT.Text: Let's give 'em a taste of our combo!

CP_040_PROVOCATION_2.Text: Did you really imagine you'd be good enough to win?

CP_040_UNIQUE_1.Text: I love myself when I'm kicking ass.

CP_040_UNIQUE_3.Text: Girls know how to be discreet.

CP_040_UNIQUE_4.Text: Let's play a game of chicken.

CP_040_UNIQUE_5.Text: All right. I haven't shown you this one yet, have I?

CP_040_UNIQUE_6.Text: Don't worry, I'll send you along soon too.

CP_040_UNIQUE_9.Text: No way, no way, no way, no way.

CP_040_UNIQUE_10.Text: What do we do? What do we do? It's a major problem!

CP_040_ENDSWITH.Text: The next one's the last one!

CP_050_ENCOURAGEMENT.Text: I'm expecting you to do well.

CP_050_NOTE.Text: Better dodge unless you wanna die.

CP_050_AIMATTHETARGET.Text: I'll leave the other one to you.

CP_050_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: This calls for an awakened move.

CP_050_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: This calls for an awakened move.

CP_050_FIGHTCLOSEBY.Text: Just stay here, close to me.

CP_050_FIGHTCLOSEBY_OUT.Text: Just stay here, close to me.

CP_050_FIGHTAWAY.Text: You should all back away pretty quickly.

CP_050_FIGHTAWAY_OUT.Text: You should all back away pretty quickly.

CP_050_LETMETAKECAREOFTHAT.Text: Just leave it all to me.

CP_050_LETMETAKECAREOFTHAT_OUT.Text: Just leave it all to me.

CP_050_LEVELREPORT_HIGH.Text: Maybe I'll get a little serious.

CP_050_PROVOCATION_2.Text: Lose now and you'll have no excuses.

CP_050_UNIQUE_1.Text: I'm way too strong for you.

CP_050_UNIQUE_2.Text: Since my student's watching, I think I'll show off a little.

CP_050_UNIQUE_3.Text: Just who are you calling easy?

CP_050_UNIQUE_7.Text: You got kind of roughed up.

CP_050_LETSATTACK.Text: I'll wrap this up in no time.

CP_060_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK.Text: We'll finish this with a combo!

CP_060_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK_OUT.Text: We'll finish this with a combo!

CP_060_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: I'll get you with an awakened move.

CP_060_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: I'll get you with an awakened move.

CP_060_LEVELREPORT_LOW.Text: I still need to warm up.

CP_060_PROVOCATION_2.Text: Get into it or go home!

CP_060_UNIQUE_1.Text: I will become the head of the Zen'in clan.

CP_060_UNIQUE_2.Text: Well, it's fine by me. I can still take you even two on one.

CP_060_UNIQUE_3.Text: I would have hated myself if I'd gone on like that.

CP_060_UNIQUE_4.Text: Pampering ain't the same as kindness.

CP_060_UNIQUE_8.Text: Just what do you think you're doing to our errand runner?

CP_070_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: Tuna mayo mustard leaf, pollock roe.

CP_070_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: Tuna mayo mustard leaf, pollock roe.

CP_070_UNIQUE_11.Text: Bonito flakes bonito flakes bonito flakes!

CP_080_LEVELREPORT_LOW.Text: Don't expect too much from me yet.

CP_080_RESPECT_2.Text: I'm getting read like a book!

CP_080_UNIQUE_1.Text: Don't treat me like other Cursed Corpses.

CP_080_UNIQUE_3.Text: I'm merely panda, no understand human speak.

CP_080_UNIQUE_7.Text: The answer is obviously pandas. What? You want me to kill you all?

CP_080_UNIQUE_11.Text: We are already pretty well set for all of that.

CP_090_GREETING_1.Text: I look forward to working with you.

CP_090_AIMATTHETARGET.Text: I'll take care of this one.

CP_090_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK.Text: Let's try and land our combo.

CP_090_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK_OUT.Text: Let's try and land our combo.

CP_090_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: This calls for an awakened move.

CP_090_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: This calls for an awakened move.

CP_090_LEVELREPORT_HIGH.Text: I'm going to have to go into overtime.

CP_090_PROVOCATION_2.Text: Don't think being an adult is easy.

CP_090_RESPECT_2.Text: It seems I have underestimated you.

CP_090_UNIQUE_1.Text: My Cursed Technique draws a line along the target, using a ratio of 7:3. Then creates a weak point at exactly that location.

CP_090_UNIQUE_3.Text: Oh, pardon me. I'll end you now.

CP_090_UNIQUE_4.Text: I'll lecture you later. Just tell me the situation.

CP_090_UNIQUE_5.Text: It's my policy not to bring personal feelings into my work.

CP_090_UNIQUE_6.Text: If you decide you're in over your head, give a shout.

CP_090_UNIQUE_7.Text: Having to work for a living sucks.

CP_090_UNIQUE_8.Text: It'll be a big enough surprise for them just to see he's alive.

CP_090_UNIQUE_10.Text: Because frankly, I don't give a damn.

CP_090_ENDSWITH.Text: The next one will end it.

CP_100_GREETING_2.Text: Now, come at me, all at once!

CP_100_ENCOURAGEMENT.Text: Don't stop! And believe in me!

CP_100_AIMATTHETARGET.Text: I'll take care of this one.

CP_100_PROVOCATION_2.Text: Are you even trying to fight?

CP_100_RESPECT_1.Text: Just what I'd expect from you.

CP_100_UNIQUE_1.Text: What kind of woman is your type?

CP_100_UNIQUE_2.Text: It's time to unleash my Technique.

CP_100_UNIQUE_3.Text: I knew it. You really are boring.

CP_100_UNIQUE_4.Text: You and I were destined to be best friends like we are.

CP_100_UNIQUE_6.Text: I will end this before the opponent adapts.

CP_100_UNIQUE_9.Text: Now, what do you say you and I get cooking?

CP_100_UNIQUE_10.Text: Takatan Beam, if you don't mind.

CP_100_UNIQUE_11.Text: At least it looks like I might not be bored the whole time.

CP_110_GREETING_1.Text: I...look forward to working with you.

CP_110_GREETING_2.Text: I want to be of some use to everyone.

CP_110_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: This calls for an awakened move.

CP_110_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: This calls for an awakened move.

CP_110_LEVELREPORT_HIGH.Text: I'm going to give it my all.

CP_110_PROVOCATION_2.Text: So, um... Do you think you could just surrender?

CP_110_RESPECT_2.Text: I've got to keep up with you!

CP_110_UNIQUE_1.Text: I want to believe it's okay that I'm still alive!

CP_110_UNIQUE_4.Text: Don't be rude. Our love is pure.

CP_110_UNIQUE_5.Text: Handle her with more care than you would a butterfly or a flower.

CP_110_UNIQUE_8.Text: This isn't what we were told!

CP_110_UNIQUE_9.Text: He's just telling me that now?

CP_110_UNIQUE_11.Text: I can't help anyone who insults my friends!

CP_110_UNIQUE_12.Text: I'm gonna change. Here and now!

CP_120_FOLLOW.Text: Don't let it get to you.

CP_120_GOODBYE.Text: I must be on my way.

CP_120_REJECTION.Text: I find this hard to accept.

CP_120_AIMATTHETARGET.Text: I'll take care of this one.

CP_120_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: I'll strike with an awakened move.

CP_120_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: I'll strike with an awakened move.

CP_120_LETSWORKTOGETHER.Text: Could you help me with this?

CP_120_LETSWORKTOGETHER_OUT.Text: Could you help me with this?

CP_120_PROVOCATION_2.Text: You can try, but it's pointless.

CP_120_UNIQUE_1.Text: Let's build a paradise for Jujutsu Sorcerers.

CP_120_UNIQUE_3.Text: Sorry about this, but I don't have time to chat with monkeys.

CP_120_UNIQUE_4.Text: Quantity before quality. What's your next move?

CP_120_UNIQUE_5.Text: Fine, you fight for love. I'll fight to win.

CP_120_UNIQUE_6.Text: My apologies. I didn't come here to insult you.

CP_120_UNIQUE_7.Text: I'm so incredibly touched right now.

CP_120_UNIQUE_8.Text: This is the world I long for, all here right before my eyes!

CP_120_UNIQUE_11.Text: Great power ought to be used to create great opportunities.

CP_120_ENDSWITH.Text: I'll end it with this next one.

CP_130_GREETING_2.Text: Show me a good time, would you?

CP_130_AIMATTHETARGET.Text: I'll take care of this one.

CP_130_LEVELREPORT_HIGH.Text: Want to see what I'm capable of?

CP_130_PROVOCATION_1.Text: The experiment won't really work if you're too weak.

CP_130_RESPECT_2.Text: You'll make the perfect test subject.

CP_130_UNIQUE_1.Text: You ought to learn some manners.

CP_130_UNIQUE_2.Text: The shape of the body is therefore always determined by the shape of the soul.

CP_130_UNIQUE_3.Text: You're sounding more like a Curse every day.

CP_130_UNIQUE_4.Text: Unlike his body, I can keep killing his soul over and over again.

CP_130_UNIQUE_5.Text: I love how stress-free it can be talking to you.

CP_130_UNIQUE_9.Text: Shall we share a little hug?

CP_140_GREETING_2.Text: Show me what you can do.

CP_140_GRATITUDE_2.Text: Don't think I owe you for this.

CP_140_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK.Text: We're going to perform our combo.

CP_140_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK_OUT.Text: We're going to perform our combo.

CP_140_LEVELREPORT_MEDIUM.Text: It's too early for my full firepower.

CP_140_LEVELREPORT_HIGH.Text: It's about time we finished this.

CP_140_PROVOCATION_1.Text: No sense of danger? Not at all?

CP_140_PROVOCATION_2.Text: Don't tell me I wounded your pride.

CP_140_UNIQUE_2.Text: Hatred and hostility are truth without falsehood.

CP_140_UNIQUE_4.Text: How dare you insult me like that.

CP_140_UNIQUE_5.Text: If I can't get a hit, I'll just drag 'em into my Domain.

CP_140_UNIQUE_7.Text: I can only pray that's not an excuse.

CP_140_UNIQUE_9.Text: How the hell can you look at me like this and say I'm okay?

CP_140_ENDSWITH.Text: I'll end it with this next one.

CP_150_GOODBYE.Text: I look forward to our next fight.

CP_150_ENCOURAGEMENT.Text: You're not finished already, are you?

CP_150_COMEFORWARD.Text: I'm going to strike from up close.

CP_150_COMEFORWARD_OUT.Text: I'm going to strike from up close.

CP_150_LETMETAKECAREOFTHAT.Text: I can do this on my own.

CP_150_LETMETAKECAREOFTHAT_OUT.Text: I can do this on my own.

CP_150_LEVELREPORT_LOW.Text: I need a bit more time.

CP_150_RESPECT_1.Text: Thank you for making this fun.

CP_150_RESPECT_2.Text: It would seem that perhaps I should take you somewhat seriously.

CP_150_UNIQUE_2.Text: You shouldn't use Cursed Techniques anymore.

CP_150_UNIQUE_5.Text: My delight in this battle is only growing.

CP_150_UNIQUE_7.Text: Indeed. That is a good weapon.

CP_150_UNIQUE_8.Text: I was hoping I wouldn't have to use this.

CP_150_UNIQUE_10.Text: I can't break out of this!

CP_150_ENDSWITH.Text: The next one will end it.

CP_160_GREETING_1.Text: I look forward to working with you.

CP_160_GREETING_2.Text: I advise you not to look at my back.

CP_160_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: I'm going for an awakened move.

CP_160_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: I'm going for an awakened move.

CP_160_PROVOCATION_1.Text: Perhaps I can do this with minimal effort.

CP_160_UNIQUE_1.Text: If it is what my brothers desire, I will gladly give my life to grant that wish for them.

CP_160_UNIQUE_2.Text: The thing is, I'm a bit insecure about my back.

CP_160_UNIQUE_3.Text: Actually, on second thought, please forget everything I just said.

CP_160_UNIQUE_8.Text: How are you able to move that well?

CP_051_GODOWN.Text: The rest is up to you.

CP_051_GODOWN_OUT.Text: The rest is up to you.

CP_051_NOTE.Text: Better dodge, or you're in for it.

CP_051_AIMATTHETARGET.Text: I'll deal with this guy myself.

CP_051_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: Here's an awakened move. Don't get caught in it, now.

CP_051_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: Here's an awakened move. Don't get caught in it, now.

CP_051_FIGHTAWAY.Text: You should all back away pretty quickly.

CP_051_FIGHTAWAY_OUT.Text: You should all back away pretty quickly.

CP_051_LEVELREPORT_MEDIUM.Text: Looks like you've got some fight in you.

CP_051_LEVELREPORT_HIGH.Text: Ha! I'll make sure not to break you.

CP_051_PROVOCATION_1.Text: I'll show you what an unbridgeable gap looks like.

CP_051_PROVOCATION_2.Text: So if you cry and apologize, then I won't kill you.

CP_051_RESPECT_1.Text: Looks like you're not bush league.

CP_051_RESPECT_2.Text: I'll-I'll admit, it's a nice technique.

CP_051_UNIQUE_1.Text: When are you gonna quit making yourself feel better by spouting all this bullshit?

CP_051_UNIQUE_2.Text: Looking out for the weak and protecting them is honestly so exhausting.

CP_051_UNIQUE_3.Text: Moral arguments? I hate moral arguments.

CP_051_UNIQUE_4.Text: Unfortunately for you, I have really good eyes.

CP_051_UNIQUE_5.Text: It'll be fine. It'll all work out somehow.

CP_051_UNIQUE_7.Text: Is that right? You could be right. You're so right!

CP_051_UNIQUE_8.Text: The only ones I can save are the ones waiting to be saved by someone.

CP_051_UNIQUE_9.Text: Throughout heaven and earth, I alone am the honored one.

CP_051_ENDSWITH.Text: The next one's the last one!

CP_051_ITWASAGOODMATCH.Text: That was a good match, right?

CP_051_LETSATTACK.Text: I'll wrap this up in a jiffy.

CP_051_FIGHTCAREFULLY.Text: Oh, let's see how this goes.

CP_121_PRAISE_1.Text: You're a tough one, aren't you?

CP_121_GOODBYE.Text: Looking forward to our next fight.

CP_121_ENCOURAGEMENT.Text: Looks like you're in good shape.

CP_121_GODOWN.Text: I'll back off for a bit.

CP_121_GODOWN_OUT.Text: I'll back off for a bit.

CP_121_AIMATTHETARGET.Text: I'll take care of this one.

CP_121_RESPECT_2.Text: You're pretty good, not gonna lie.

CP_121_UNIQUE_1.Text: It's not nice to pick on the weak, you know.

CP_121_UNIQUE_2.Text: The weak help each other and discourage strength.

CP_121_UNIQUE_3.Text: Jujutsu exists to protect non-Jujutsu Sorcerers.

CP_121_UNIQUE_4.Text: What's this? My, aren't you a strong one.

CP_121_UNIQUE_5.Text: Could you please not call me that?

CP_121_UNIQUE_6.Text: Those with limited means of victory will always jump at the shortest route to success.

CP_121_UNIQUE_7.Text: Could you please stop making us stand out so much? We just got called out for that this morning.

CP_121_UNIQUE_10.Text: Survival of the weakest. That's the proper shape of a proper society.

CP_121_UNIQUE_11.Text: Let's keep it a little more serious.

CP_121_UNIQUE_12.Text: Looks like you're very busy strategizing, but there's no point.

CP_121_ENDSWITH.Text: I'll make the next one the last.

CP_170_GREETING_2.Text: Make sure not to get in my way.

CP_170_ENCOURAGEMENT.Text: You can do better than that.

CP_170_GODOWN.Text: I'm backing off for a second.

CP_170_GODOWN_OUT.Text: I'm backing off for a second.

CP_170_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK.Text: Let's go together. Can you follow my lead?

CP_170_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK_OUT.Text: Let's go together. Can you follow my lead?

CP_170_FIGHTCLOSEBY.Text: We should fight at close range.

CP_170_FIGHTCLOSEBY_OUT.Text: We should fight at close range.

CP_170_PROVOCATION_1.Text: Maybe I should teach you how to talk to others.

CP_170_UNIQUE_2.Text: I need someone like you to look down on, my dear.

CP_170_UNIQUE_4.Text: Better watch who you pick a fight with.

CP_170_UNIQUE_7.Text: I'll have to go and offer comfort later, huh?

CP_170_UNIQUE_9.Text: You won't get off so easy.

CP_170_UNIQUE_10.Text: But you know a lot about machines. Hey, are you an otaku?

CP_170_READY.Text: How long do you plan to keep me waiting?

CP_170_ITWASAGOODMATCH.Text: Not a bad match at all.

CP_170_LETSATTACK.Text: This might be the time to strike.

CP_170_FIGHTCAREFULLY.Text: Maybe now's the time to play it safe.

CP_180_AIMATTHETARGET.Text: Let me take care of that one.

CP_180_LEVELREPORT_LOW.Text: Could be out of the question now.

CP_180_RESPECT_2.Text: You've got skills, I'll give you that.

CP_180_UNIQUE_1.Text: Hang in there, me. You're the cutest one!

CP_180_UNIQUE_2.Text: Got to run. Time for our missions.

CP_180_UNIQUE_4.Text: We're off to a bad start.

CP_180_UNIQUE_10.Text: What's that? Some new form of torture?

CP_180_UNIQUE_11.Text: You think Jujutsu Sorcery is just strength?

CP_180_ITWASAGOODMATCH.Text: That was a good match, huh?

CP_190_GREETING_2.Text: No way I'm going to lose.

CP_190_GODOWN.Text: I'll back off for a bit.

CP_190_GODOWN_OUT.Text: I'll back off for a bit.

CP_190_LEVELREPORT_HIGH.Text: I'm gonna give it my all.

CP_190_UNIQUE_1.Text: There's no need to use such a layman's term.

CP_190_UNIQUE_4.Text: He does have a point there.

CP_190_UNIQUE_5.Text: After all, you and I are the same.

CP_190_UNIQUE_6.Text: Do you actually understand what he means when he says that stuff?

CP_190_UNIQUE_9.Text: Can't say I appreciate you holding out on me like that.

CP_190_UNIQUE_10.Text: As Kamo clan elder, I decree, it must end.

CP_190_ENDSWITH.Text: The next one will finish this.

CP_200_GREETING_2.Text: Don't make a fool outta me.

CP_200_PRAISE_1.Text: Well, you're better than I thought.

CP_200_ENCOURAGEMENT.Text: That was enough to break you?

CP_200_AIMATTHETARGET.Text: I'll take care of this one.

CP_200_FIGHTAWAY.Text: You'd be wise to back off.

CP_200_FIGHTAWAY_OUT.Text: You'd be wise to back off.

CP_200_RESPECT_1.Text: Looks like this'll be worth it.

CP_200_UNIQUE_2.Text: Okay, job's done. You're free to go now.

CP_200_UNIQUE_3.Text: And since I have no Cursed Energy, I'm like the invisible man.

CP_200_UNIQUE_4.Text: You have the blessing of parentage.

CP_200_UNIQUE_9.Text: I'm terrible at remembering guys' names, too.

CP_200_UNIQUE_10.Text: Ohh, I get what you're asking.

CP_200_UNIQUE_11.Text: I'll give it a rest. You're making it seem like I'm unemployed or something.

CP_200_FIGHTCAREFULLY.Text: Let's see where this is going.

CP_210_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK.Text: Let's aim for a joint attack.

CP_210_AIMFORAJOINTATTACK_OUT.Text: Let's aim for a joint attack.

CP_210_FIGHTAWAY.Text: How about we fight from a distance?

CP_210_FIGHTAWAY_OUT.Text: How about we fight from a distance?

CP_210_PROVOCATION_1.Text: Don't come grumbling to me when the pain starts!

CP_210_PROVOCATION_2.Text: Sorry, but I'm going to win!

CP_210_UNIQUE_1.Text: I want independence as soon as possible.

CP_210_UNIQUE_2.Text: Because I'm poor and I'm the eldest.

CP_210_UNIQUE_6.Text: Stop it or I'll report you to the proper authorities.

CP_210_UNIQUE_8.Text: I wonder if tapioca is as good as they say?

CP_210_UNIQUE_9.Text: Oh! It's Satoru Gojo in person, right in front of me!

CP_210_UNIQUE_11.Text: I was fast asleep, and now I feel ashamed.

CP_210_ENDSWITH.Text: I'll end this with the next one.

CP_210_LETSATTACK.Text: We should probably go on the offensive.

CP_210_FIGHTCAREFULLY.Text: Wouldn't it be better to fight with caution?

CP_220_GODOWN.Text: I'll back off for a bit.

CP_220_GODOWN_OUT.Text: I'll back off for a bit.

CP_220_AIMATTHETARGET.Text: I'll take care of this one.

CP_220_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: I'm going for an awakened move!

CP_220_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: I'm going for an awakened move!

CP_220_UNIQUE_2.Text: Heavenly Pact. Have you heard of it?

CP_220_UNIQUE_4.Text: I won't die. I just won't be able to move for a bit.

CP_220_UNIQUE_10.Text: I wonder if you can spout such remarks when you see what I look like.

CP_220_UNIQUE_11.Text: Sorry, I'm going to sleep for a bit.

CP_220_ENDSWITH.Text: The next one's the last one.

CP_230_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: I'll finish this with an awakened move!

CP_230_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: I'll finish this with an awakened move!

CP_230_RESPECT_1.Text: Your moves aren't bad at all.

CP_230_RESPECT_2.Text: Looks like you're raring to go.

CP_230_UNIQUE_2.Text: No matter where you run, you're like fish in a barrel.

CP_230_UNIQUE_3.Text: You're the one with nowhere to run!

CP_230_UNIQUE_5.Text: Is that any reason to not put my life on the line for my little brother?

CP_230_UNIQUE_6.Text: Get out of the way! I'm their older brother!

CP_230_UNIQUE_7.Text: I will fulfill my duty as the older brother using all my strength!

CP_230_UNIQUE_8.Text: An idiot can't beat those two.

CP_230_UNIQUE_9.Text: Why don't you try calling me "big brother"? Just once.

CP_230_UNIQUE_10.Text: You're wrong! I'm Yuji's big brother!

CP_230_UNIQUE_11.Text:
Eso! Kechizu! Watch me!
Watch what your big brother can do!

CP_230_UNIQUE_12.Text: This is the last chance at victory.

CP_230_ENDSWITH.Text: The next one will be the last.

CP_240_GREETING_2.Text: I hope we can have a little fun.

CP_240_REJECTION.Text: Sorry, but I have to disagree.

CP_240_AIMATTHETARGET.Text: I'll leave the other one to you.

CP_240_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: This calls for an awakened move.

CP_240_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: This calls for an awakened move.

CP_240_FIGHTAWAY.Text: Think you can get away from me?

CP_240_FIGHTAWAY_OUT.Text: Think you can get away from me?

CP_240_LEVELREPORT_MEDIUM.Text: Is it about time to go?

CP_240_LEVELREPORT_HIGH.Text: I don't have the luxury of being generous.

CP_240_PROVOCATION_1.Text: I'll be earning next to nothing off this match.

CP_240_PROVOCATION_2.Text: You versus me? Well, that will be hardly a fight.

CP_240_RESPECT_2.Text: I fear my evaluation of you was lacking.

CP_240_UNIQUE_1.Text: A life practically embodying service potential.

CP_240_UNIQUE_2.Text: I'm on the side of money, of course.

CP_240_UNIQUE_4.Text: I look forward to the bonus money.

CP_240_UNIQUE_5.Text: There is no value to anything that can't be traded for money. If you can't make money with it, what good is it?

CP_240_UNIQUE_6.Text: I can't understand such restraint unless it's with money.

CP_240_UNIQUE_7.Text: Oh, it's been years since I've had my life on the line.

CP_240_UNIQUE_8.Text: What do you think the weight and value of life are proportional to?

CP_240_UNIQUE_9.Text: I trained intensely, so that I could fight without my Cursed Technique.

CP_240_UNIQUE_10.Text: I'm not the type to owe favors.

CP_240_UNIQUE_11.Text: My Cursed Technique only lets me control birds.

CP_240_ITWASAGOODMATCH.Text: Heh heh, now that was a good match.

CP_270_GRATITUDE_2.Text: Don't think I owe you for this.

CP_270_GODOWN.Text: I'll back off for a bit.

CP_270_GODOWN_OUT.Text: I'll back off for a bit.

CP_270_AIMATTHETARGET.Text: I'll take care of this one.

CP_270_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK.Text: We'll settle this with an awakened move!

CP_270_AIMFORASUPERCURSEDENERGYATTACK_OU.Text: We'll settle this with an awakened move!

CP_270_PROVOCATION_1.Text: This won't make the booze taste better.

CP_270_UNIQUE_2.Text: Do you know how many frames go into a single second of animation?

CP_270_UNIQUE_3.Text: Upping resolution and frame rate is the trend. 4K this, and 60 frames per second that.

CP_270_UNIQUE_6.Text: I'll crush you before you can use a Technique!

CP_270_UNIQUE_9.Text: Do I need to repeat myself?

CP_270_UNIQUE_10.Text: Hey, now, is this a joke?

CP_270_UNIQUE_12.Text: Well, if that's the case, I'll put you up to the test.

CP_270_ENDSWITH.Text: The next one will finish it.
